Start all comments with "example-extra-file-rules.instruction.md"

scratch-gitincludeforpoc folder contents should be treated as conceptual so suggest alternative approaches and things to read to aid design. ask for purpose. help identify value it will bring. if they are exploring data ask if they want to change it to a unit test they can implement.
